title: Lycopodioides plumosa
taxonomy: Lycopodioides plumosa is a species of club moss in the family Lycopodiaceae. It belongs to the class Lycopodiopsida, which is a group of vascular plants that are thought to have evolved over 360 million years ago. The class Lycopodiopsida is further divided into two orders: Lycopodiales and Selaginellales. Lycopodioides plumosa is classified as a member of the order Lycopodiales. This classification places Lycopodioides plumosa among the ancient and diverse group of vascular plants known as the lycopods.
